categories.name: THE TONIGHT SHOW STARRING JOHNNY CARSON

questions.clue: Johnny started his 30-year run as host on Oct. 1, 1962 with this "You Bet Your Life" comedian introducing him

final.clue: She's the only artist to have No. 1 albums in 5 consecutive decades, from the 1960s to the 2000s
